title: Fix JSN privacy leak when device is passed
description: GameScreen PassDeviceModal only checks currentPlayerIndex. When phase is ACTION_RESPONSE, passConfirmed is not reset, so Player 1 sees Player 2's card. Fix state reset logic.

title: Update SetupScreen instructions for Sabotage card
description: SetupScreen incorrectly shows Trade Route instructions instead of Sabotage. Update text and copy.

title: Fix ResultsScreen curved edges masking Table
description: Add overflow: hidden to Paper wrappers in ResultsScreen to prevent Table corners from poking out.

title: game-progress-persistence: auto-save gameState to localStorage
description: Auto-save full gameState to localStorage after every action; zero-flash recovery on reload via persistence.js + App.jsx integration. Implemented across 3-agent sprint (Sanika impl+QA, Aman arch review, Sonu UX review). Shipped in commit 1004291.
close_reason: Shipped: commit 1004291 (auto-save), pushed+verified in sync with origin/main. 13/13 unit tests, 5/7 manual QA scenarios pass, build clean, gitnexus impact LOW risk on touched App.jsx symbols.

title: Hand cards render as plain text in ActionModal payment/select sheets
description: When resolving a payment with no cash or selecting properties to steal/swap, the payer/actor's own hand displays as plain text boxes without color. Root: PlayerContextView + PaymentSheet hand-card blocks use Typography instead of reusing <Card> component. Acceptance: (1) PaymentSheet 'Haath mein' hand renders as <Card mini showValue /> with full color/type. (2) PlayerContextView in Sly Deal/Forced Deal/Sabotage/Deal Breaker sheets shows colored cards too. (3) Mini cards wrapped (not horizontal scroll). (4) No behavior regression in give-as-payment logic. (5) CounterpartyStrip/PlayerBoard unchanged.

title: Deploy multiplayer worker + fix VITE_WS_URL warning
description: Cloudflare Worker deployed (wss://dhandha-multiplayer.klickbae8yt.workers.dev, verified HTTP 200). Hardcoded as DEFAULT_WS_URL fallback in MultiplayerSetupScreen. Fixed + verified.
close_reason: Fixed + build verified + gitnexus_detect_changes LOW risk

title: Fix JSN privacy leak + counter-flow gap
description: PassDeviceModal gated on activeInteractorIdx not currentPlayerIndex. Also added missing PHASE.JSN_RESPONSE to GameScreen action-phase array (pre-existing counter-flow bug). Fixed + verified.
close_reason: Fixed + build verified + gitnexus_detect_changes LOW risk

title: Update SetupScreen Sabotage copy + icon
description: Trade Route text + RouteIcon replaced with Sabotage text + SwapHorizIcon. Fixed + verified.
close_reason: Fixed + build verified + gitnexus_detect_changes LOW risk

title: Fix ResultsScreen curved-edge table clipping
description: Paper overflow:hidden + Table overflowX:auto wrapper. Fixed + verified build pass.
close_reason: Fixed + build verified + gitnexus_detect_changes LOW risk

title: Add manual Server URL input in MultiplayerSetupScreen
description: Provide a TextField for Server URL with default to VITE_WS_URL, instead of throwing an error when env var is missing in CI.
